slots.root: pt-40 pb-20 md:pt-52 md:pb-32 min-h-[90vh] flex items-center
slots.badgeWrapper: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-900/20 border border-emerald-200 dark:border-emerald-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-full
slots.badgeText: text-[10px] font-black text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400 uppercase tracking-widest
slots.headline: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-black text-gray-900 dark:text-white tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]
slots.trustLabel: text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white uppercase tracking-widest
slots.visualWrapper: relative h-[400px] md:h-[500px] flex items-center justify-center elem-anim z-10 hidden lg:flex
slots.glow: absolute w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-emerald-400 to-sky-400 opacity-20 blur-3xl
slots.cardPulse: absolute w-48 h-48 rounded-[3rem] bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border-4 border-white dark:border-gray-800 shadow-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center transform rotate-12 float-slow z-20
slots.floatingDoctor: absolute top-[10%] left-[-10%] w-56 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-gray-100 dark:border-emerald-900/30 rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-xl float-fast z-30
slots.docAvatar: w-10 h-10 rounded-full border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700
slots.availabilityBadge: mt-3 bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-900/20 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-center py-1.5 rounded-lg
slots.botCard: absolute bottom-[10%] right-[-10%] bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-2xl flex items-center gap-4 float-slow z-30
